interpretation: V1.34BO compresses the current branch into a single reduce closure stack: sell ladder first, board expectancy second, board hierarchy third, reentry ladder fourth, execution binding last.
The point is not to pretend the branch is closed. The point is to show exactly where closure exists as governance and exactly where it still fails as execution.
